description: C# and .NET documentation corpus for SWEObeyMe
purpose: Provide comprehensive C# and .NET documentation for C# Bridge diagnostics and .NET development

integrationStatus.csharp_best_practices: Partial - .NET coding conventions and VS Code debugging docs downloaded

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from Microsoft documentation, ECMA standards, and reputable C#/.NET resources. Prioritize official specifications and Microsoft Learn documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: spec_name.pdf, guide_name.html
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official Microsoft and ECMA documentation.
instructions.csharpFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand C# language semantics for error detection, (2) identify C# patterns and anti-patterns, (3) support .NET 8/10 features, (4) understand Roslyn compiler behavior, (5) enforce C# best practices.
